examples: Tiffany conceptualized herself as a mother, whose main task was to feed her baby.
The couple ordered a new set of sterling silver rings from Tiffany for $200 each.
Tiffany loved all kinds of shoes.
Tiffany-style pendant lights lend the only flash of colour in an otherwise monochrome and sparsely decorated room.
The Tiffany premium is long-standing because the company is viewed a potential takeover target.
